hooks.command: COUNTER="/Users/irenehwang/Desktop/lookbook/.claude/.readme_counter"; n=$(cat "$COUNTER" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); n=$((n+1)); echo "$n" > "$COUNTER"; if [ $((n % 5)) -eq 0 ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"%s tool calls reached since the last reminder. Per user preference, consider updating README.md in /Users/irenehwang/Desktop/lookbook to reflect recent changes (new features, dependencies, structure). Skip silently if nothing material has changed."}}\n' "$n"; fi
